song.title: You Are God Alone
song.lyrics:
[V1] .B E B You are not a god created |by human hands. .B E B You are not a god dependent |on any mortal man. .B F#/A# G#m E B You are not a god in need of |anything we can give. . F#/A# B E By Your plan, |That’s just the way it is.
[C] . B F#/A# You are God alone. From before time began . G#m E You were on Your throne, You were God alone. . B F#/A# And right now, in the good times and bad . G#m E You are on Your throne, You are God alone.||
. B F#/A# You’re Unchangeable. You’re Unshakeable. . G#m E You’re Unstoppable. That’s what You are.
(repeat)
[V2] You’re the only god whose power |none can contend. You’re the only god whose name and |praise will never end. You’re the only god who’s worthy of |everything we can give. You are God.| That’s just the way it is.
